action_text: Click a blank area on the page to dismiss the popover
rationale: The “Choose search context” popover is obstructing interactions with the report list; clicking an empty area should dismiss it so I can filter the list by Title.

action_text: Press Escape to close the search context popover
rationale: If the popover persists, pressing Escape often closes overlays, allowing access to list filter controls.

action_text: Toggle the Show/Hide filter for the reports list
rationale: Once the popover is closed, enabling the list filter will let me search for the report by Title (e.g., contains “agent”).

action_text: Click the Title column header to sort reports by title
rationale: Sorting the list by Title may make it easier to locate a report like “Incidents by agent” alphabetically if filtering isn’t available.

action_text: Scroll down through the reports list
rationale: Scrolling the list could reveal more reports if the desired one isn’t initially visible.
